notes: Editable data for waterfront-polo-lab.html. Market medians are WHOLE-MARKET (all home types) — a true WATERFRONT home of 2,500-3,000 sqft costs a premium over the median; use budgetFit as the waterfront-in-$1-2M read, not medK. Masters water-polo clubs are a SEED layer — Masters (adult) water polo is sparse and rosters change; confirm YOUR club's exact practice pool and replace/add below. q='measured' = pulled from Redfin this session; q='est' = metro-derived estimate to verify.

driveModel.note: Approximate. drive_min = haversine_miles * roadFactor / avgSpeedMph * 60. This is a straight-line-plus-detour estimate, NOT a routed isochrone — verify real drive time for any short-listed address.

insuranceBands.3: High (~$8-20k+/yr; coastal — luxury waterfront stacks wind+flood far higher)

budgetFitScale.strong: $1-2M readily buys waterfront + 2.5-3k sqft + land here
budgetFitScale.partial: $1-2M buys some waterfront; prime frontage is $2M+
budgetFitScale.over: waterfront single-family starts >$2M — out of budget

mastersClubs.name: South Florida (Miami / Coral Springs / Ft. Lauderdale)
mastersClubs.note: Documented adult/Masters + strong club scene (e.g., Coral Springs Aquatic Complex is a real Olympic-caliber venue). VERIFY a Masters program trains here now.

mastersClubs.name: Boca Raton / Palm Beach
mastersClubs.note: Adult/club water-polo activity in Palm Beach County. VERIFY exact Masters practice pool.

mastersClubs.name: Tampa
mastersClubs.note: Adult/Masters + deep HS/club scene (Berkeley, Plant, Jesuit). VERIFY current Masters practice location.

mastersClubs.name: St. Petersburg (North Shore Aquatic Complex)
mastersClubs.note: North Shore is a real water-polo pool. VERIFY a Masters program trains here.

mastersClubs.name: Orlando metro (UCF / Rosen area)
mastersClubs.note: College (UCF) + adult activity; densest HS cluster in FL. VERIFY the Masters practice pool + schedule.

mastersClubs.name: Sarasota (Sarasota Sharks / Selby-Potter)
mastersClubs.note: Sarasota Sharks is a real, prominent aquatics club. VERIFY it runs a Masters water-polo practice (vs age-group/HS).

mastersClubs.name: The Villages
mastersClubs.note: Large active-retiree rec community — likely adult water polo. VERIFY a Masters club + pool.

mastersClubs.name: Jacksonville (Bolles area)
mastersClubs.note: Bolles anchors a strong HS scene; adult/Masters is thinner. VERIFY a Masters practice.

mastersClubs.name: Gainesville (UF)
mastersClubs.note: UF collegiate club water polo. VERIFY a town Masters practice.

mastersClubs.name: Naples / Bonita Springs
mastersClubs.note: SW Gulf; HS programs exist. VERIFY any Masters practice (may be sparse).

markets.name: Clermont / Minneola / Montverde
markets.note: Clermont chain of lakes; $1-2M buys lakefront + 0.5-2 acres; near Montverde/Foundation. Inland = no surge.

markets.name: Windermere / Butler Chain
markets.note: Prime Butler Chain (Isleworth/Keene's Pointe) is $2M+; smaller-lake Windermere/Winter Garden frontage fits $1-2M.

markets.name: Winter Garden / Horizon West
markets.note: Growing; lakefront pockets in budget; close to Orlando water-polo pools.

markets.name: Mount Dora / Tavares
markets.note: Harris Chain big-lake frontage + land, strong value; ~40-50 min to Orlando pools (check radius).

markets.name: Lake Nona
markets.note: Master-planned lakes; close to Orlando/UCF area pools.

markets.name: Ortega / Avondale (St. Johns River)
markets.note: Deep-water St. Johns riverfront + big lots; $1-2M over-buys; ~10-20 min to Bolles. medK is metro-wide (Ortega itself is pricier).

markets.name: Fleming Island / Orange Park (Clay)
markets.note: St. Johns riverfront + acreage, value; ~25-30 min to Bolles.

markets.name: Julington Creek / Fruit Cove (St. Johns Co)
markets.note: Top schools; creek/riverfront + land; ~25-35 min to Bolles/Ponte Vedra pools.

markets.name: Ponte Vedra Beach (Intracoastal)
markets.note: Intracoastal fits $1-2M; oceanfront is $2M+. Ponte Vedra HS water polo nearby.

markets.name: Palm City (St. Lucie River, Martin Co)
markets.note: River + gated acreage; Martin Co caps density = uncrowded; ~15-20 min to Jensen Beach/Martin Co HS pools.

markets.name: Sewalls Point / Stuart
markets.note: River/Intracoastal, exclusive, low-density; wide-water/ocean-access $2M+.

markets.name: Vero Beach mainland (Indian River)
markets.note: Indian River (Intracoastal) frontage; Vero Beach HS water polo; quieter.

markets.name: Apollo Beach / MiraBay
markets.note: Deep-water canal + dock to Tampa Bay; 93 DOM = negotiable. WARNING: Helene 2024 caused catastrophic surge flooding here. ~35-40 min to Tampa pools.

markets.name: Palm Harbor / Safety Harbor (Pinellas)
markets.note: Gulf/sound frontage; near Palm Harbor Univ / East Lake pools; surge-exposed.

markets.name: Parrish / Terra Ceia (Manatee River)
markets.note: Manatee River + acreage inland of the islands; ~30-40 min to Sarasota Sharks; Gulf surge caution.

markets.name: Bradenton (Manatee River)
markets.note: Manatee River frontage; near Sarasota Sharks / Saint Stephen's; Gulf surge caution.

markets.name: Cape Coral (Gulf-access canals)
markets.note: Cheapest big Gulf-access canal homes + land; BUT Masters water polo likely >40 min AND Ian 2022 ground-zero. Verify a club before considering.

markets.name: Punta Gorda (Charlotte Harbor)
markets.note: Sailboat-access canal + harbor value; same caveat — water polo likely far + high surge.

markets.name: Fort Lauderdale (Las Olas / canals)
markets.note: BEST water polo (Pine Crest/St. Thomas) but waterfront SF is $2M+ on small lots — over budget for your brief.

markets.name: Boca Raton (Intracoastal / canals)
markets.note: Elite water polo; waterfront SF $2M+ and crowded — over budget for waterfront 2.5-3k.
